sections.title: Before completion of the Watchtower quest

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Who are you? Are you one of the new guards?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm an adventurer.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Well what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looking for adventures - what else?

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Oh my, oh my! What does it all matter in the end, anyway?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the matter?

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Oh dear, oh dear. Darn and drat!

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: We try hard to keep this town protected.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: But how can we do that when the Watchtower isn't working?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean it isn't working?

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: The Watchtower over here works by the power of magic. An ancient spell designed to ward off ogres that has been in place here for many moons.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: The exact knowledge of the spell is lost to us now, but the essence of the spell has been infused into four powering crystals that keep the tower protected from the hordes in the Feldips.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how come the spell doesn't work?

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: The crystals! The crystals have been taken!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Taken?

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Stolen!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stolen?

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Yes, yes! Do I have to repeat myself?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I be of help?

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Help? Oh wonderful, dear traveller!

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Yes I could do with an extra pair of eyes here.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: There must be some evidence of what has happened here. Perhaps you could assist me in searching for clues?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I would be happy to.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Try searching the surrounding area. If you find anything unusual, bring it here. Try the bushes - I've read enough adventure stoies to know that clues get caught in bushes all the time.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: I will tell the guards to let you past - that way, you can just use the ladder to get in and out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not interested.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: That's typical, nowadays. It's left to us wizards to do all the work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not interested in your rantings.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Hmph! Suit yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You wizards are always complaining.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Complaining? Complaining!

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: What folks these days don't realise is that if it weren't for us wizards, this entire world would be overrun with every creature you could possibly imagine. And some you couldn't even conceive of!

sections.title: After completion of the Watchtower quest

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Greetings, friend. I trust all is well with you? Yanille is safe at last!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost the scroll you gave me.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Ho, ho, ho! A comedian to the finish! There it is, in your backpack!

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Never mind, have another...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's okay.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: We are always in your debt; do come and visit us again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any more quests for me?

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: More quests? No, indeed, adventurer. You have done us a great service, already.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's okay.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: We are always in your debt; do come and visit us again.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: Oh lovely, fresh water... Thanks!

sections.title: Any unfinished stage of the Potion (Watchtower)

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: No, no. The potion is not complete yet.

lines.speaker: Watchtower Wizard
lines.text: I can't let you use this now, it's just too dangerous. I'd better take it from you before you injure yourself.
